## LibraryRuntime.AnyRuntimeConfection type

Union type of all concrete runtime confection classes. Use this type when you need to work with any runtime confection.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type AnyRuntimeConfection = RuntimeMoldedBonBon | RuntimeBarTruffle | RuntimeRolledTruffle;
```
**References:** [RuntimeMoldedBonBon](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.runtimemoldedbonbon.md)<!-- -->, [RuntimeBarTruffle](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.runtimebartruffle.md)<!-- -->, [RuntimeRolledTruffle](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.runtimerolledtruffle.md)
